title: Create 2: Farm to Table
description: This modpack contains all of the mods that are used in my series "Create 2: Farm to Table"
body:
This modpack collects the mods that are being used in the [Create 2: Farm to Table](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLpG95UswOupcPkM_k3XSxLnjv71poYkHV) series on [Music Free Gaming](https://youtube.com/@musicfreegaming).

The pack pulls together a number of Create and Create adjacent mods to automate everything involved in food production. There are also a mods to simplify some basic things like villager management, cobblestone farms, and iron farms that are boring to deal with over and over again.
